accountTab.signOutBody: You can sign back in any time.

adaptiveEngineCard.emptyBody: As you reflect on tasks, rubai learns how you actually execute and updates this roadmap to match. Tap below to evolve it manually.
adaptiveEngineCard.helperText: Add a couple of reflections in Today first so rubai has signal to learn from.

behavioralInsights.observationDefault: You tend to lose momentum after long stretches of uninterrupted work. Try inserting a 'micro-recovery' break to sustain your peak focus longer.
behavioralInsights.rhythmAdopted: Rhythm adopted — daily plans will favor these windows

calendar.autoWriteSubtitle: Each generated task becomes a reminder in your calendar
calendar.googleNote: Google Calendar runs through your workspace's Replit connector and works on web too. Heads up: it's currently shared at the workspace level — fine for personal use, not for multi-user accounts.
calendar.googleUnavailableBody: The workspace owner needs to connect Google Calendar in Replit first.
calendar.intro: rubai uses your calendar only as raw signal — to understand your day, find ideal time slots, and plan tasks around real meetings. Connecting only grants access. Reading events and writing tasks are two separate switches below, both off by default.
calendar.letAiReadSubtitle: Used as context to find free time and plan around meetings
calendar.mobileOnlyBody: Native calendar sync is available on iOS and Android. Switch to Google Calendar for web.
calendar.noWritableBody: The connector is reachable but no calendars allow writes. Check the workspace's Google account permissions, then retry.
calendar.permissionBody: Allow calendar access in Settings to let rubai see your day.
calendar.pickCalendarBody: Choose which calendar to write to first.
calendar.togglesFootnote: Both off by default. Turn on only what you're comfortable sharing — you can disconnect anytime to stop everything.

coach.calDisabled: Turn on calendar sync in Account → Calendar sync first.
coach.calNoCalendar: Pick a calendar in Account → Calendar sync, then ask me again.
coach.calNoPermission: I need calendar permission first. Open Account → Calendar sync to grant access.
coach.calNothing: There's nothing to add to your calendar yet.
coach.calWeb: Calendar sync is mobile-only — try this from the iOS or Android app.
coach.cameraPermission: Allow camera access to snap what you're working on.
coach.connectionLost: Bağlantı bir anlığa kəsildi. Mesajını yenidən göndər — davam edək.
coach.couldntApply: I couldn't apply that just now — want me to try again?
coach.emptyDesc: Add a goal and finish the intake form first.
coach.noChats: No chats yet. Tap "New chat" to start.
coach.opener: I'm here. We're working on {{headline}}. Tell me what's on your mind, what got in the way, or what you want to push on.
coach.photoPermission: Allow photo access to attach an image.
coach.quotaExceeded: Günlük AI limitinə çatdın. Daha çox istifadə üçün planını yüksəlt. 🚀
coach.reverted: Reverted — back to how it was.

coachMemory.cardBody: Your coach builds a private memory of facts and context you share across conversations. This helps it give you more relevant, personal guidance over time — without you having to repeat yourself.
coachMemory.confirmClearBody: RubAI will forget everything it has learned about you. This cannot be undone.
coachMemory.confirmClearWeb: Coach memory will be cleared. This cannot be undone.
coachMemory.emptyBody: Start a conversation with your coach. As you chat, RubAI will quietly build up a memory of what matters most to you.

errorFallback.message: Please reload the app to continue.
errorFallback.title: Something went wrong

forgotPassword.codeSent: We just emailed a 6-digit reset code to {{email}}.
forgotPassword.enterCodeError: Enter the 6-digit code we emailed you.
forgotPassword.enterEmailError: Enter the email on your account.
forgotPassword.passwordTooShort: New password must be at least 8 characters.
forgotPassword.requestSubtitle: Enter the email on your account and we'll send you a 6-digit code.
forgotPassword.resetSubtitle: Enter the code we emailed to {{email}} and pick a new password.

generating.genericError: Something went wrong building your roadmap.
generating.limitMessageMany: You've reached your plan's limit of {{count}} active goals. Free up a slot by removing or replacing an existing goal.
generating.limitMessageOne: You've reached your plan's limit of {{count}} active goal. Free up a slot by removing or replacing an existing goal.
generating.title: Engineering your roadmap.

goals.deleteMessage: "{{label}}" and all of its roadmap, history, and progress will be removed.
goals.emptyDesc: Add your first goal to start building a roadmap.
goals.emptyText: No goals yet. Add one from the Goals tab.
goals.subtitle: {{count}} of {{limit}} on the {{plan}} plan
goals.title: Your active goals
goals.upgrade: Upgrade your plan to run more goals in parallel

intake.errorText: Couldn't reach the planner. Try again.
intake.footerMissingMany: {{count}} required questions are missing — scroll up to find them.
intake.footerMissingOne: 1 required question is missing — scroll up to find the highlighted card.
intake.loadingText: rubai is designing your intake form

newGoal.limitBannerMany: You're at your plan limit of {{count}} active goals. Upgrade in Account or remove a goal first.
newGoal.limitBannerOne: You're at your plan limit of {{count}} active goal. Upgrade in Account or remove a goal first.
newGoal.placeholder: e.g. Get promoted to senior engineer in 9 months

notifications.permissionBody: Enable notifications in your device Settings to receive reminders.
notifications.reminderBody: Time to check your daily tasks and keep moving forward. 🎯
notifications.smartNudgesSubtitle: AI-timed reminders adapted to your rhythm

plans.featPremium1: Up to 25 goals across life areas
plans.intro: Pick the plan that matches how many goals you want rubai to coach you through. You can switch anytime.
plans.productUnavailable: Product not available. Please try again.
plans.sandboxNote: This is a sandbox purchase — no real payment will be taken.

privacy.confirmResetBody: This permanently deletes every goal, roadmap, history entry and preference.
privacy.confirmResetWeb: Erase ALL goals, history and progress?
privacy.resetSubtitle: Erase every goal, roadmap, and reflection
privacy.shieldAlertBody: Biometric lock will activate the next time you open rubai.

profile.allowPhotoAccess: Allow photo access to change your picture.
profile.codeSentHelper: We sent a code to {{target}}. Enter it below to confirm.
profile.savingSignsOut: Saving will sign you out of all other devices.
profile.signOutMessage: You can sign back in any time.
profile.signedOutOtherDevices: You have been signed out of other devices.
profile.title: Profile
profile.verificationIncomplete: Verification did not complete. Please try again.

proposedActionCard.addTaskGeneric: Add a new task to today

reflectionSheet.addMediaBody: Snap a photo with the camera or pick one from your library.
reflectionSheet.analysisFailed: Saved your reflection, but couldn't analyse the photo this time.
reflectionSheet.cameraPermission: Allow camera access to snap a photo.
reflectionSheet.notePlaceholderCompleted: Optional note — what helped, what made it click?
reflectionSheet.notePlaceholderSkipped: Optional note — what got in the way?
reflectionSheet.photoCaption: rubai will analyse this photo when you save.
reflectionSheet.photosPermission: Allow photo access to attach an image.

replaceGoal.confirmMessage: "{{label}}" and all of its progress will be replaced with your new goal. This can't be undone.
replaceGoal.emptyBody: You don't have any completed goals to replace yet.
replaceGoal.subtitleMany: You're on the {{plan}} plan ({{used}} of {{limit}} goals used). Removing one frees a slot for your new goal.
replaceGoal.subtitleOne: You're on the {{plan}} plan ({{used}} of {{limit}} goal used). Removing one frees a slot for your new goal.
replaceGoal.title: Pick a goal to swap out
replaceGoal.upgradeText: Or upgrade your plan to keep all your goals
replaceGoal.warningText: No new goal queued — deletions here will simply remove the selected goal.

rewards.emptyBody: Once a goal has a roadmap, an emblem appears for every phase — and a grand emblem for finishing the whole goal.
rewards.introEmpty: Create a goal with a roadmap to start collecting emblems.
rewards.introProgress: {{unlocked}} of {{total}} unlocked. Finish each roadmap phase to reveal its emblem.
rewards.title: Rewards

roadmap.adaptiveEmpty: As you reflect on tasks, rubai learns how you actually execute and updates this roadmap to match.
roadmap.emptyDesc: Finish intake and rubai will generate your personalized roadmap.
roadmap.evolveError: Couldn't evolve the roadmap right now. Try again in a moment.
roadmap.evolveHelper: Add a couple of reflections in Today first so rubai has signal to learn from.
roadmap.noChange: Checked — your roadmap is still the right shape for now.

settings.comingSoonBody: We're building this for the next release.

signIn.googleIncomplete: Google sign-in didn't complete. Please try again.
signIn.googleIncompleteIframe: Google sign-in didn't complete. Inside the workspace preview, OAuth popups can be blocked — open this page in a new browser tab and try again.
signIn.iframeNotice: Tip: Google sign-in opens a popup. To use it from the workspace preview, open this page in a new browser tab first.
signIn.signInIncomplete: Sign-in didn't complete ({{status}}). Please try again.
signIn.subtitle: Sign in to continue with your AI goal coach.
signIn.title: Welcome back
signIn.twoFactorAppHint: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app (e.g. Google Authenticator, Authy).
signIn.twoFactorEmailHint: We sent a 6-digit code to your email address. Enter it below to sign in.
signIn.twoFactorPhoneHint: Enter the 6-digit code sent to your phone number.

signUp.googleIncomplete: Google sign-up didn't complete. Please try again.
signUp.googleIncompleteIframe: Google sign-up didn't complete. Inside the workspace preview, OAuth popups can be blocked — open this page in a new browser tab and try again.
signUp.iframeNotice: Tip: Google sign-up opens a popup. To use it from the workspace preview, open this page in a new browser tab first.
signUp.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters long.
signUp.subtitle: Start your AI-coached journey toward your biggest goal.
signUp.title: Create your account
signUp.verificationRequired: We couldn't finish creating your account. Email verification appears to still be required on the server. Please contact support.

subscriptionCard.disclaimer: Demo subscription. No real charges — switch freely to explore the multi-goal experience.

tierChangeToast.endedSubtitle: You've been moved to the Free plan.

today.noActiveGoalDesc: Add a goal in the Goals tab to see today's plan.
today.plannerErrorDesc: Pull down to refresh and we'll generate today's plan.

welcome.customHint: Be specific if you can. rubai will generate a tailored intake form for your exact goal.
welcome.describeOrPick: Describe a goal or pick a template
welcome.noteText: rubai adapts as you go. Skip a day and the plan softens. Stack wins and it pushes you.
welcome.placeholder1: Launch my freelance design studio by October
welcome.placeholder2: Run my first half marathon in 6 months
welcome.placeholder3: Read 30 books and journal weekly this year
welcome.placeholder4: Move to Berlin and find a job by June
welcome.placeholder5: Save 15,000 for a down payment in 9 months
welcome.subtitle: Tell rubai any goal — career, fitness, study, money, creative, personal — and it will generate a smart intake form, then build a real plan around your time and how you actually behave.
welcome.title:
What do you want
to make happen?
